body:
- Removes solution struct in favour of named-tuples.
	- Allows functions for surface variables to be used within iterative solvers.
	- Organizes methods into appropriate component files, and collects `types`.
	
	- Reduces alloc-limit to 0 in QA tests.
	- Cleans up documentation and removes dependency on `DocStringExtensions`

	Pending: Removal of dependence on thermodynamic state objects.
title: Update interfaces, generalize solvers, and organize source functions.
